author: Nintendo Everything
text:
June 2026 Nintendo Direct pre-orders roundup

A slew of games were announced for Switch 2 and Switch today during the new Nintendo Direct, and while retailers going live with new pre-orders, we’ve gone ahead and rounded everything up. This post will be updated over the next couple of days as new products go live. We’ll also have everything in our weekly pre-order post on Sunday which...

The post June 2026 Nintendo Direct pre-orders roundup appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Video: Kingdom Hearts 4 Nintendo Switch 2 vs. PS5 / Xbox Series X / PC graphics comparison

A fresh Kingdom Hearts 4 graphics comparison video has come in for the Nintendo Switch 2, PS5, Xbox Series X and PC versions. The game appeared during today’s Nintendo Direct which caught fans by surprise. We learned that when Kingdom Hearts 4 is ready to go, it’ll be on Nintendo Switch 2 at launch. The initial footage indicates that we’re...

The post Video: Kingdom Hearts 4 Nintendo Switch 2 vs. PS5 / Xbox Series X / PC graphics comparison appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Toby Fox shares update on what’s happening with Deltarune Chapter 6

Work continues on Deltarune, and creator Toby Fox provided an update on Chapter 6 today. In case you missed the news, fans won’t have to wait long to experience the next part of the game. Chapter 5 was featured in the Nintendo Direct presentation today and we learned that it’s coming out later in the month. In a newsletter, Fox...

The post Toby Fox shares update on what’s happening with Deltarune Chapter 6 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Xenoblade Genesis reveals director, composers, character designers

Nintendo didn’t have a whole lot to say about Xenoblade Genesis following the Direct reveal, but we now have information about its director, composers, and character designers. First up, Tetsuya Takashi is acting as general director. That shouldn’t come as a big surprise given his involvement with the franchise and Monolith Soft as a whole. Yoko Shimomura is the main...

The post Xenoblade Genesis reveals director, composers, character designers appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Kingdom Hearts HD 1.5 + 2.5 HD Remix coming to the original Nintendo Switch, cloud versions being delisted

We’ve got even more news about Kingdom Hearts, as we now know that Kingdom Hearts HD 1.5 + 2.5 HD Remix are coming to the original Nintendo Switch. Additionally, cloud versions of all prior games are being delisted. Kingdom Hearts HD 1.5 + 2.5 HD Remix includes Kingdom Hearts Final Mix, Kingdom Hearts Re:Chain of Memories, Kingdom Hearts 2 Final...

The post Kingdom Hearts HD 1.5 + 2.5 HD Remix coming to the original Nintendo Switch, cloud versions being delisted appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Pricing revealed for Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave, Nintendo Switch Sports Resort, Pokemon Pokopia DLC

We have new pricing details about three titles featured in today’s Nintendo Direct – specifically Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave, Nintendo Switch Sports Resort, and the Pokemon Pokopia DLC. The toughest pill to swallow here will be Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave. If you go for the standard physical version, it’ll cost $80. Digitally it costs $70. Nintendo Switch Sports Resort will...

The post Pricing revealed for Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave, Nintendo Switch Sports Resort, Pokemon Pokopia DLC appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Atelier Yumia just got a Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

Atelier Yumia has returned as anew Nintendo Switch 2 Edition just released. This follows the previous Nintendo Switch launch. With this version, there’s enhanced graphics and an improved frame rate, plus support for GameShare, allowing you to play together with a nearby player. You can check out the following overview of the game: People gather memories as they live their...

The post Atelier Yumia just got a Nintendo Switch 2 Edition appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Constance getting a Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

ByteRockers Games, Parco Games, and Blue Backpack have announced a new Nintendo Switch 2 version of Constance. A release date wasn’t provided. Numerous upgrades will be available compared to Nintendo Switch 1. The game will feature an improved performance mode running up to 120 FPS, an improved quality mode running at 1440p resolution, new and improved audio, and integrated achievements....

The post Constance getting a Nintendo Switch 2 Edition appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Developer behind Star Fox on Nintendo Switch 2 has been revealed, and it’s surprising

The developer behind Star Fox on Nintendo Switch 2 has now been revealed, and it’s probably what most hadn’t been expected. This is not an internal Nintendo team or even another studio that was previously thrown around. Instead, it’s being handled by Velan. Who is Velan, you ask? Well, the company actually teamed up previously with Nintendo on Mario Kart...

The post Developer behind Star Fox on Nintendo Switch 2 has been revealed, and it’s surprising appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Earth Defense Force 5, Earth Defense Force 6 coming to Nintendo Switch 2

Announced today, a new version of Earth Defense Force 5 is in development. A worldwide release is set for October 8, 2026. On top of that, Earth Defense Force 6 is also on the way. This will launch during the winter. Thanks to D3, we have the following information: Earth Defense Force 5, the action shooter enjoyed by 2 million...

The post Earth Defense Force 5, Earth Defense Force 6 coming to Nintendo Switch 2 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
